CONCLUSION :
[ ] This goods was previously inspected and rejected on as per our Inspection Report Number
IJ . As the supplier claimed that improvement had been made, a re-inspection was conducted.
[ ] Combine items sampling inspection
“Per the Client's request, Intertek has performed this inspection by using the combine items sampling method. The Client understands that under this
inspection method the statistical techniques that would otherwise be the most appropriate for this particular inspection as under the applicable single item
sampling method will be substantially compromised, hence the chance of failing to identify quality and other problems in the inspected goods is greater
than that when using the single item sampling method. In view of that, the Client and Intertek hereby expressly agree that Intertek shall be exempted from all
and any liability caused by or arising from using the combine items sampling method including liabilities to any party for any decision or reliance concerning
the acceptance, payment authorization or shipment of the inspected goods and the Client will hold Intertek harmless against any loss and damages as a
result of so doing.”
